meta_description: Angelo Ortiz Vega — Fullstack AI Engineer based in Costa Rica. I build and ship AI-powered products, lead technical initiatives, and bring ML from research to production. 4+ years in startups and product teams.
hero_txt_keywords: Fullstack AI Engineer · ML in Production · Data Science · Builder
hero_txt_about: Fullstack AI Engineer. I build and ship AI-powered products end-to-end — from models and APIs to the interfaces people use. Four years as a fullstack and software engineer; in the last year I've transitioned into ML and now focus on putting it into production.
about_text_desc_1: Hello! I'm Angelo Ortiz Vega, a Fullstack AI Engineer with over four years building and shipping AI-powered products for startups and organizations. I own the full stack: from training and integrating ML models into production systems to the APIs and UIs that expose them. I work with Python (Flask, FastAPI), AWS, and modern frontends (React, Angular, Node.js), and I care as much about model performance as about how real users and businesses use what we build.
about_text_desc_2: My day-to-day spans building and integrating ML models into production, designing data pipelines, and automating workflows. I've shipped predictive systems, intelligent agents, and RPA solutions with scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch. I'm focused on closing the gap between AI research and real products that improve efficiency and user experience — and on leading the technical work that gets them there. For example: at QuboSystems I built a payroll system for a private university that included an ML module to classify faculty salary categories based on multiple characteristics; at Easyhop I led UX research and technical initiatives that drove strategic investment in the driver platform.
about_text_desc_3_1: I am currently completing a degree in Computer Engineering at the
about_text_desc_3_2: strengthening my theoretical and analytical foundation. The program focuses on the sciences and technologies that enable the design, construction, implementation, and maintenance of computer systems — both hardware and software.
about_text_desc_4_1: In parallel, I have worked as a university lecturer for over three years, teaching Artificial Intelligence, Data Analysis, Full Stack Development, and UX Design at
about_text_desc_4_2: with a focus on practical, project-based learning and real-world applications.
about_text_desc_5: When I'm not at the computer, I'm usually hiking, reading, hanging out with friends, or curating
about_text_desc_5_a: When I'm not at the computer, I'm usually hiking, reading, hanging out with friends,
skills_text_subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with
jobs_ucreativa: Enriched the learning experience by incorporating real-world case studies, collaborative projects, and innovative teaching methodologies.
Mentored students in the development of capstone projects and functional prototypes aligned with current industry practices.
Structured and authored the complete UX Design Certification program, including courses such as Research for Digital Experiences, Solution Ideation, Design Principles, and Interaction & Usability.
Delivered courses in Python for AI, Applied AI, and Machine Learning & Deep Learning, with emphasis on backend development, API creation, and deployment on AWS cloud services.
jobs_freelancer1: Delivered end-to-end software solutions for startups and diverse clients, combining robust backend development, cloud integration, process automation, and frontend development.
Focused on building scalable, maintainable, and efficient systems using modern technologies and best engineering practices.
Projects ranged from marketing and product web sites to automation tools and APIs for startups, shipped end-to-end using React, Node, Python, and AWS.
jobs_creai: Full-stack development of applications and APIs that power Creai's AI solutions, using Ember.js, React, PHP, Laravel, and Python.
Collaboration with data science and product teams to integrate ML/AI features into production systems.
Building and maintaining scalable web systems that support AI-powered products.
jobs_easyhop: Built and enhanced driver and passenger web/mobile applications, developing critical and custom features aligned with client and stakeholder needs.
Led a UX research initiative that drove strategic investment in a web-based driver platform, improving revenue and operational efficiency.
Built the driver mobile application, handling routes, maps, user flows, and pickup lists — with a strong focus on route handling and map-based pickup points.
jobs_qubosystems: Designed and implemented end-to-end components for internal and client-facing initiatives, including REST APIs and admin dashboards.
Served as technical lead on several full-stack projects with a strong focus on frontend development using React.
Delivered scalable solutions across the full stack, from backend services to user interfaces.
Built a payroll system for a private university with an ML module for classifying faculty salary categories.
Developed the data encryption module for a third-party mobile point-of-sale (card reader) app for a Costa Rican bank.
jobs_csi: Corrective and preventive maintenance of electrical equipment.
Support to engineers in the development and design of electronic equipment that will improve the cap production process.
Accompaniment in the elaboration of the main electrical maintenance plan of the plant.
projects_angelortizvcom: angelortizv.com is a website where whenever I have the opportunity, I leave a few minutes of what I am doing to share what I am learning or what I am thinking.
projects_easyhop: Easy Hop is the only platform in Costa Rica that connects private group shuttles with visitors in both rural, and touristic destinations. Within the project I was in charge of developing the mobile application for drivers, whose main function was to see the stopping points on a map and validate passenger tickets.
projects_topspinai: Table tennis is a fast-paced and dynamic sport where coaches, players and analysts require accurate tools to assess performance in real-time. The absence of advanced systems that can process and analyse high-resolution video to detect critical events such as ball bounces and net hits limits users' ability to make informed decisions. TopspinAI addresses this need by providing an automated system that uses artificial intelligence for ball detection and semantic segmentation, improving analysis and decision making during matches.
projects_uxarc: ux-arc is a personal blog and repository dedicated to sharing knowledge, experiences, and resources about the world of user experience design. Over the years, I have collected valuable information on various aspects of digital design, and this space was born with the intention of organizing and disseminating that knowledge in an accessible way for those looking to improve their skills and understanding in the field of UX.
projects_ceitcr: ce-itcr is the repository where the programming projects that I have carried out throughout my career in Computer Engineering courses are housed. The respective documentation on each course and code is on github.
projects_ngClone: This is a Google Keep clone built with Angular to practice and improve my Angular skills. It follows the original app's design principles and includes many core features.
projects_karaoke: Karaoke is a project for the course SOA41D - Software Architecture. A simple Karaoke Streaming App build with React for the Front-end and Nodejs for Server-side.
projects_es369ims: Inventory Management System is an inventory service where products in stock are displayed through categories. Its data source is Excel, so that administrators can access the data more easily.
projects_itcrCourses: itcr-courses is the repository of my notes in the career of Computer Engineering. The principal purpose of this repository is record some of the data of the courses by the computer engineering degree program of the ITCR.
projects_spaceInvaders: Space Invaders is a Japanese shooting video game released in 1978 by Taito. In the original planning for the game, they had planned to have the aliens be human soldiers. Taito figured that they did not want to send the message that shooting humans was ok, so they changed it to aliens.
projects_pacman: Pac-Man is a 1980 maze action video game developed and released by Namco for arcades. I made a clone of the famous game in C ++ and Qt to apply concepts that I learned in courses on Algorithms and Data Structures.
blog_section_intro: Recent writing on software, AI, and what I'm learning.
gallery_text_title: Some things from my life in pictures
contact_text_desc: Although I'm not currently looking for freelance opportunities, my inbox is always open. If you have any questions or just want to say hello, I'll do my best to get back to you!
full_archive_text_subtitle: A big list of things I've worked on
